message:
feat(fwc): add MetadataProvenance, ProvenanceMetadataField, and truthfulness invariant tests

Introduce MetadataProvenance enum (DeclaredByConnector, ObservedByHost,
MeasuredAtRuntime, InferredFromPolicy, Unattributed) to track the origin
of metadata values. Add ProvenanceMetadataField<T> pairing field state
with provenance, including backwards-compatible serde (missing provenance
deserializes as Unattributed).

Add 67 new tests across readiness.rs and catalog.rs:
- 18 provenance unit tests (serde round-trips, map preservation, authoritativeness)
- 28 readiness truthfulness invariants (stable tags, no value leaks, exit code partitions)
- 21 catalog truthfulness invariants (LiveHost/Offline consistency, cap token requirements)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
